mapper.update: UPDATE `project` SET `project_code` = #{projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `project_name` = #{projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `leader_user_id` = #{leaderUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `dept_id` = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `project_type` = #{projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `project_level` = #{projectLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `approved_amount` = #{approvedAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `start_date` = #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, `end_date` = #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, `lifecycle_stage` = #{lifecycleStage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE `project_id` = #{projectId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
